accept.reason: node genuinely applies but its package.json lives at firebase/functions/package.json — two directories down, past the node pack's intentional near-root fingerprint cap (root or one dir down) that keeps nested fixtures from tripping detection. So the declaration is deliberately ahead of the fingerprint here. Every other declared pack fingerprint-matches without acceptance: flutter (app/pubspec.yaml), firebase (firebase/firebase.json, one dir down — now detected since Claudinite PR #190), android (app/android/.../AndroidManifest.xml), ios (app/ios/Runner/Info.plist), executable-requirements (dev/requirements/requirements.md).
